title: T-076 — PO actuals Technical review/non-conformance trigger contract
prompt:
# T-076 — PO actuals Technical review/non-conformance trigger contract

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §0, §5.1A, §11.2
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Technical-side PO actuals review/non-conformance event handler contract without master-data mutation.

This is a cross-module wiring contract; implement only Technical-side handler/tests if the event bus exists, or a typed service plus integration test seam if purchasing module is not present. Review approval can later call supplier_specs or cost history explicit approval actions. Non-conformance can be an outbox event if 09-QUALITY tables are not present yet. No UI in this task. Non-conformance emission must use the shared contract from T-082 when present; until 09-QUALITY exists, persist/emit the exact outbox event shape defined there.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- apps/web/lib/technical/po-actuals-review.ts [create]
- apps/web/events/handlers/po-receipt-actual-recorded.ts [create]
- tests/integration/technical/po-actuals-review.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given PO actual price exceeds tolerance, when event is processed, then a Technical review/non-conformance is emitted and items.cost_per_kg is unchanged.
2. Given PO actual supplier differs from approved supplier_spec supplier, then SUPPLIER_MISMATCH is recorded and supplier_specs is unchanged.
3. Given the same PO event is processed twice, then only one review/non-conformance exists for the idempotency key.
4. Given review is approved later, then master data changes only through explicit supplier_spec/cost approval action, not inside the event handler.
5. Given a variance is classified from po.receipt_actual_recorded, then emitted non_conformance.requested payload conforms to T-082 and includes source_event_id, idempotency_key, source_module, entity refs, reason codes and severity.

## Test strategy
- RED integration test with fixture item, supplier_spec and item_cost_history before handler code.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/integration/technical/po-actuals-review.test.ts

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement purchasing UI or PO module.
- Do not update supplier_specs or cost_per_kg inside receipt handler.
- Do not emit duplicate non-conformance on event retry.
- Do not invent a PO/TO-specific NCR payload that diverges from T-082.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
